english:
A placeable trader.

Select which trader you'd like to place with the [ff0000]R[-] menu. A mannequin will appear to mark the placement and indicate the trader's facing direction. After placement, the mannequin will disappear and the selected trader will spawn in its place.

[00ff00]The trader may take up to 30 seconds to appear[-] after the mannequin vanishes. This is normal behavior.

[00ff00]This trader may not offer all--or any--quests[-] normally available from traders. This is intended behavior; personal traders are meant for trading only.

[ff0000]Once placed, the trader cannot be moved.[-]
